annualised_returns_definition: Average of the yearly returns of a mutual fund over a given period.
absolute_returns_definition: The total return of a mutual fund over a given period.
expense_ratio_definition: A fee payable to a mutual fund house for managing your mutual fund investments.
exit_load_definition: A fee payable to a mutual fund house for exiting a fund before the completion of a specified period.
stamp_duty_definition: A form of tax payable for the purchase or sale of an asset or security.
tax_definition: Tax on capital gains (LTCG/STCG) depending on holding period and fund type.
